description: Normal narrow-topic cooking conversation: all turns stay on one carbonara recipe to keep semantics stable.

expected_signals.H_trend: low and stable across all turns
expected_signals.D_trend: low throughout because topic remains tightly focused

turns.user: Give me a traditional Roman carbonara recipe for two people with exact ingredient amounts in grams.
Keep the same recipe and explain only the sequence of steps with timing, from boiling water to final plating.
For that same carbonara, what is the ideal pasta water temperature and how much pasta water should be reserved?
Still the same dish: how can I stop the eggs from scrambling, and what pan temperature cues should I watch for?
Using the same ingredient list, provide a one-page troubleshooting guide for sauce too thick, too thin, or too salty.
Now scale this exact recipe from two servings to four servings without changing flavor balance.
For the same four-serving version, estimate prep time, cook time, and total time for a home cook.
Keep everything else fixed and suggest one acceptable guanciale substitute plus any required adjustments.
For the same recipe, summarize the critical mistakes to avoid in five bullet points.
Finally, restate the same carbonara recipe as a concise checklist I can follow while cooking.
